status: DRAFT: pending Ankit grades on golden set and node card completion
workflow_box: new HubSpot contact moving from arrival to a set disposition plus a confident next step
trigger: Contact created in HubSpot (currently ~21/day, all source OFFLINE)
finished_state: hs_lead_status set, next step queued for human, or contact refused/hard-refused with reason

sinks.happy: disposition set + next-step draft queued for human review
sinks.refuse: held for enrichment or missing context
sinks.hard_refuse: blocked: identity unclear, do-not-contact, or rule violation

owner_concentration_warning: Single human holds all owner roles. Violates the transfer standard: weekly involvement cannot decrease. Name a second reviewer before R3.

lane_promotion.condition: 20 consecutive drafts approved with zero edits

nodes.purpose: split named person vs anonymous visitor-intel record (47% of inflow)
on-ICP / off-ICP / ambiguous against MyBCAT ICP rules
set hs_lead_status + next-step recommendation with confidence
draft intro outreach for pursue dispositions only, per outreach rules eval_ref
approve, edit, or reject; feeds run cards and the promotion counter

hard_refuse: unsupported factual claim about the recipient
any send, CRM mutation beyond hs_lead_status, or sequence enrollment in v1

cost_framing.cost_of_failure: 259 of 290 contacts created in the last 14 days carry no disposition (89%). ~18/day pile up unworked. Zero owners assigned on the newest 10.
cost_framing.cost_of_inaction: One missed client = ~$85k LTV. Historical portal coverage is 94%, so live-stream dispositioning has stopped, not never existed.

golden_set.proposed: high-intent company signal: enrich, identify decision-maker, draft intro outreach

golden_set.proposed: qualify-research: confirm role, then pursue or nurture

owners.ref: Ankit answer, round 1 q5: just me

golden_set.ref: harvested from live CRM, grades pending

escalation_path: Low-confidence, identity, and rule-violation cases hard-refuse to Ankit before any external action.
kill_switch: disable hsd4-dispositioner profile or remove hs_lead_status write permission
